title: polygala sibirica var. elegans
intro: Polygala sibirica var. elegans, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala sibirica var. elegans include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
